title: PataLand3 - Mod
description: Official Mod for PataLand3. Made by Shynux
body:
PataLand3 - Mod

This mod is only created for the ModPack PataLand3. If you have a suggestion or you need help, contact us.

With this mod you can create an economy with the PataCoins.


Gold PataCoins

Silver PataCoins

Cooper PataCoins
The mod will be uploaded with more new features depending of the necesaries of the ModPack and server
